En: The Headless FALN Rider -- he could appear at any minute!
Zh: 无头FALN骑士——他随时可能出现！

En: Please tell me we're not here to look for a headless man in a tracksuit riding a horse... because there's no such thing.
Zh: “麻烦你告诉我，我们来这儿不是为了找一个穿着运动服的无头骑士……因为根本就没有这种东西存在。”

En: Don't listen to the lieutenant! He doesn't know *anything*.
Zh: 别听警督的！他*什么*都不知道。

En: We'll just wait and see.
Zh: “我们等着瞧吧。”

En: No, we're just passing through.
Zh: “不是，我们只是路过。”

En: Absolutely not. That's not why we're here. Why would you even think that?
Zh: “当然不是，我们可不是为这个来的。你为什么会这么想？”

En: No one's actually *seen* the Headless FALN Rider because he doesn't exist. He's an urban legend. A *legend*, meaning a story that's not real.
Zh: “没人真正*见过*无头FALN骑士，因为他根本*不存在*。他只是个都市传说。而*传说*，就意味着*一个虚构的故事。*”

En: We've been running around together doing *odd things* for days. I've seen how your mind operates... this is just the sort of thing it would latch on to.
Zh: “这几天我们一直在做一些*稀奇古怪*的事。我已经见识过你的脑子是怎么运转的了……它就是对这种东西特别感兴趣。”

En: Good. It's late, we should get some rest.
Zh: “很好。现在很晚了，我们该休息了。”

En: How would you know?
Zh: “你怎么知道的？”

En: There's nothing to wait for. We should get some rest, it's been a long day.
Zh: “没什么好等的。我们应该回去休息，今天已经够漫长的了。”

En: I'm just going to wait a few more minutes, just in case.
Zh: “我再等个几分钟，以防万一。”

En: You're right, what was I thinking? Let's go. [Leave.]
Zh: “你说的对，看我……都在想什么呢？我们走吧。”[离开。]

En: The lieutenant nods.
Zh: 警督点了点头。

En: Yes, stay! What's a few more minutes going to hurt?
Zh: 没错，留下！再等几分钟又不会怎么样？

En: The lieutenant has his arms crossed, fingers tapping against his bicep. "There, we waited. Nothing happened. Happy now?"
Zh: 警督双手交叉抱在胸前，手指轻轻敲打着自己的二头肌。“好了，我们等了。什么也没发生。现在高兴了？”

En: This has made me unspeakably unhappy.
Zh: “让我无法形容的……不高兴。”

En: You were right, Kim. What was I thinking? Let's go. [Leave.]
Zh: “你说的没错，金。我到底在想什么呢？我们走吧。”[离开。]

En: I know myths and legends are enticing, but in the end they're just stories for children... to teach them lessons, or to frighten them. He gestures toward the waves.
Zh: “我知道神话和传说很有诱惑力，但最后那些都是讲给小孩听的故事……为了给他们上一课，或者是吓唬他们。”他向着海浪比划着。

En: Let's go. It's very late -- we should be resting already. Tomorrow will be another tough day.
Zh: “我们走吧。现在已经很晚了——我们早就应该回去休息的。明天又会是难熬的一天。”

En: Yeah, you're right. Would've been cool, though, don't you think?
Zh: “是啊，你说的没错。不过，难道你不觉得这样很酷吗？”

En: Yes, it would have been *very* cool. The lieutenant nods. "Now let's get some rest."
Zh: “是啊，会*特别*酷。”警督点点头。“现在我们走吧，回去休息。”

En: I admit... it is a thing I would *usually* do. But not this time.
Zh: “我承认……我*经常*会做这种事情。但这次不一样。”

En: Okay, you got me. I had a hope...
Zh: “好吧，你说服我了。我有个心愿……”

En: ...a foolish hope. But it's okay. I get it. It would have been *cool*. The lieutenant nods. "Now let's get some rest."
Zh: “……一个愚蠢的心愿。但是没关系。我明白的。其实它感觉真的挺*酷*的。”警督点点头。“现在我们走吧，回去休息。”

En: Good. It's already late, we need to get some rest. Tomorrow will be another tough day.
Zh: “很好。现在已经很晚了——我们早就应该回去休息的。明天又会是难熬的一天。”

En: There's nothing here -- You lied to me!
Zh: 这里什么也没有——你骗我！

En: Your ears hum from the silence inside your mind...
Zh: 脑子里那片静寂在你的耳边嗡嗡作响……
